common.tagline: Sell your digital work without the headaches.

home.description: Elixio is the playful, creator-owned marketplace where designers, developers, and artists showcase, market, and sell digital assets.
home.feature_showcase_text: Build a branded storefront that feels like you.
home.feature_market_text: Reach buyers with search, collections, and shareable links.
home.feature_sell_text: Checkout, licensing, and instant delivery handled.

auth.signin_subtitle: Welcome back. Sign in to your Elixio Digital account.
auth.magic_link_sent: Magic link sent. Check your inbox.
auth.register_buyer_title: I want to buy digital work
auth.register_creator_title: I want to sell my work

dashboard.title: Creator Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Revenue, top assets, conversion, cohort retention.
dashboard.no_revenue: No revenue in this period yet — your first sale will appear here.
dashboard.bulk_ops_desc: Update prices, tags, or publish many assets at once.
dashboard.studio_desc: AI tools — listing copywriter, asset critique, sales coach.

studio.title: Studio
studio.subtitle: AI tools that write, critique, and advise. Powered by Gemini.
studio.copywriter_placeholder: e.g. Minimalist wedding invitation template pack with 5 designs, A5 size, editable in Canva and Photoshop
studio.critique_kind: Asset kind (e.g. icon set, wedding invitation, 3D model)
studio.critique_question: Optional specific question for the AI

bulk.title: Bulk operations
bulk.subtitle: Update many assets at once. Non-delete operations can be rolled back.

sell.title: Start Selling
sell.subtitle: Upload your first asset, set a price, and reach buyers.

stats.title: Elixio in numbers
stats.subtitle: We show the numbers, not just the marketing. Updated every 60 seconds from our production database.
stats.why_we_share_body: Every other marketplace hides its numbers. We don't. If you're a creator thinking about switching, you should be able to see exactly what kind of growth we're getting — and judge for yourself whether it's worth it.

about.title: About Elixio Digital
about.body: Elixio Digital is a creator marketplace built for buying and selling high-quality digital assets.

errors.validation: Please check the form for errors
errors.rate_limited: Too many requests. Please slow down.

overview.title: Your profile
overview.subtitle: Manage how you appear across Elixio and what data you share.

avatar.title: Avatar & display
avatar.subtitle: Your avatar appears on your storefront, profile, and any assets you sell.
avatar.help: Paste a URL to an image you'd like to use, or leave blank to use your initials.

quick_links.title: Quick links
quick_links.subtitle: Jump to the section you need.
quick_links.privacy_desc: Data export, cookie consent, sale opt-out.
quick_links.account_desc: Update your display name, bio, and avatar.

account.title: Account
account.subtitle: Edit your display name, bio, and avatar.
account.bio_help: A short description that shows on your public profile and storefront.
account.bio_placeholder: Tell people a little about yourself…
account.email_help: Email changes require a separate verification flow.

security.title: Security
security.subtitle: Password, two-factor authentication, passkeys, OAuth, and active sessions.

password.title: Password
password.subtitle: Set or change your account password.

mfa.title: Two-factor authentication
mfa.subtitle: Add an extra factor to your login.
mfa.enabled_help: Your account is protected with two-factor authentication.
mfa.disabled_help: Enable two-factor authentication to protect your account.

passkeys.title: Passkeys
passkeys.subtitle: Sign in with a fingerprint, face, or hardware key.

oauth.title: Connected accounts
oauth.subtitle: Sign in faster with Google or GitHub.

sessions.title: Active sessions
sessions.subtitle: Devices currently signed in to your account.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.subtitle: Pick which emails you want from us.

email.title: Email
email.orders_help: Required — confirms your purchases and tax receipts.
email.security_help: Required — alerts for new logins, password changes, MFA events.
email.product_help: New features, improvements, and occasional tips.
email.marketing_help: Promotions, seasonal campaigns, and partner offers.
email.creator: Creator activity

push.title: Push notifications
push.subtitle: Mobile and desktop push.
push.mobile_only_help: Push notifications will be available in the Elixio mobile app. Add your email to the list above for now.

privacy.title: Privacy & data
privacy.subtitle: Export your data, manage cookies, and exercise your rights.

export.title: Export your data
export.subtitle: Download a JSON archive of everything we hold on you.
export.help: We email a download link to your registered address. The link expires in 24 hours.

includes.orders: Order history, receipts, tax line items

export.requested: Check your inbox. Your data export will arrive within a few minutes.

cookies.title: Cookie consent
cookies.subtitle: Manage which cookies Elixio can store.
cookies.necessary_help: Required for authentication, security, and your locale preference. Always on.
cookies.analytics_help: Anonymous usage data — helps us improve the product. Off by default.
cookies.marketing_help: Personalized content and ad measurement. Off by default.

sale.title: Sale of personal information
sale.subtitle: California Consumer Privacy Act (CCPA) Right to Opt-Out.
sale.not_sold: We do not sell your personal information.
sale.not_sold_help: Elixio Digital has never sold, rented, or shared personal information with third-party advertisers. This applies to all users regardless of locale.

delete.title: Delete your account
delete.subtitle: Permanently remove your account and personal information.
delete.warning_body: Once deleted, your account cannot be recovered. Make sure you've exported any data you want to keep first.
delete.whats_preserved_help: We retain a minimal, anonymized record of past transactions to meet tax, accounting, and fraud-prevention obligations.
delete.preserves_legal_basis: Legal basis: tax law (US, EU, India, Brazil), financial recordkeeping (SOX-equivalent), fraud prevention.
delete.reason_help: Helps us improve. Never shared publicly.
delete.password_confirm_help: Enter your password to confirm deletion.
delete.type_delete_help: Type the literal word DELETE in capitals.
delete.requested: Account scheduled for deletion. You'll be signed out in a moment.

footer.tagline: The marketplace where creators and buyers meet without the platform tax headaches.

cookie.title: We use cookies
cookie.body: Elixio Digital uses a minimal set of essential cookies for authentication, your language preference, and theme. We don't track you across the web or sell your data.

a11y.dictation_placeholder: Click the microphone and start speaking. Your words will appear here.
a11y.stt_unsupported: Speech recognition is not supported in this browser. Try Chrome, Edge, or Safari.

chat.title: Elixio Help
chat.subtitle: Ask anything about Elixio. The assistant is trained on our documentation.
chat.welcome_body: Ask me anything about Elixio. I can help with features, pricing, account issues, accessibility, and more.
chat.welcome_body_long: I'm the Elixio assistant. I've read our documentation, FAQ, and feature guides, so ask me anything about buying, selling, account settings, accessibility, or troubleshooting.
chat.kb_disclaimer: If I don't know, I'll point you to the docs or support email rather than making something up.
chat.indexing: Knowledge base still indexing — answers will improve in a minute.
chat.input_hint: Enter to send. Shift+Enter for new line. 🎤 for voice.
chat.error: Sorry, I couldn't reach my knowledge base. Please try again or email support@elixiodigital.com.
chat.suggestion_pricing: How much does Elixio charge creators?
chat.suggestion_become_creator: How do I become a creator?
chat.suggestion_accessibility: What accessibility features do you offer?
chat.suggestion_data_export: How do I export my data?
